title: DoggoSMP
description: An enhanced Vanilla+ modpack focused on QoL improvements, visual tweaks, and multiplayer-ready features
body:
![doggosmp-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/907703f067b72868e2ca1b0f707bbd99877d6b2b.png)

This **Vanilla+ modpack** brings you the best **quality of life improvements**, **performance optimizations**, and a **beautifully enhanced gameplay experience**, while staying true to the heart of Minecraft.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

- 🎯 **Performance Enhancements**  
  Includes optimization mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **C2ME** to deliver smoother gameplay, better FPS, and faster world loading times.

- 🛠️ **Quality of Life Improvements**  
  Enjoy small but powerful changes with mods like **Jade**, **Controlling**, **FallingTree**, **RightClickHarvest**, **Mouse Tweaks**, and **BetterStats**.

- ✨ **Vanilla+ Experience**  
  Immerse yourself in a more atmospheric world with **Ambient Sounds**, **Falling Leaves**, **Presence Footsteps**, **Visuality**, and **Particle Rain** while maintaining that classic Minecraft feel.

- 🎨 **UI and Visual Enhancements**  
  Beautifully improved menus and interfaces using **FancyMenu**, **Blur**, **Better Third Person**, and **Drippy Loading Screen**.

- 🌍 **World and Structure Expansions**  
  Fresh biomes and structures with **Terralith**, **Amplified Nether**, **Structory**, and **Nullscape** for endless exploration.

- 🔥 **Optional Multiplayer Ready**  
  Play anywhere you like!  
  While designed for **DoggoMC Network (play.doggomc.net)**, you can also enjoy it on **any Fabric 1.21.4 server**. However, DoggoMC offers the best support and compatibility for this pack!

---

## 📜 Important Notes

- ℹ️ Compatible with Minecraft **1.21.4** (Fabric Loader).
- ℹ️ Simple installation, no manual setup needed.
- ℹ️ This modpack includes a modified version of [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#MD6CQt), customized with minor sound changes specific to our community. The resource pack (`Gargolita Tweaks 2.0.zip`) is fully optional and has no gameplay impact.


---

## 📦 Mod List (Highlights)

<details>
<summary>Click to view some of the key mods included!</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) (Performance)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) (Performance)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) (Memory optimization)
- [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) (Chunk performance)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) (Block and Entity Info)
- [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) (One-click tree cutting)
- [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) (Auto-harvest crops)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) (Better keybinding search)
- [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) (Soundscape enhancements)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) (Realistic foliage)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) (Enhanced walking sounds)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) (New particle effects)
- [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) (End world revamp)
- [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether) (Nether world improvements)
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) (Overworld terrain overhaul)
- [Structory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory) (New structures)
- [Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) (Menu background blur)
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) (Smoother character movement)
- [Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen) (Custom loading screens)

...and many more! 🚀

</details>

---

Start your next adventure today with the **DoggoSMP Modpack**! 🌟
